title: IIT Roorkee – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 1 post such as Junior Research Fellow (JRF) – 1 vacancy for eligible Graduate/Postgraduate engineering candidates with GATE qualification, with the application window online open from 14 May 2026 to 05 June 2026 on iitr.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate with GATE Score card

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Roorkee to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
